meta.title: POC Pavilion OT System Reveal
meta.description: Join Dale and a mystery guest to reveal the Proof of Concept Pavilion System Provider and the system the 8 vendors will deploy and demo their security solutions on. We will go over the process, system architecture, components and POC Pavilion process. And we will take your questions, comments and suggestions.
